'''Al'Har''' was the [[Color/Legends|yellow]] primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Al'Har system]] containing [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu's]] homeworld of [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]].

{{Star-stub}}
